kumonTopic: Addition and subtraction up to 4-digit numbers
description: Kumon Level D covers fluent addition and subtraction of multi-digit numbers with regrouping
notes: CCSS 3.NBT.2. Kumon builds computational fluency through drill and repetition.

description: Kumon Level D introduces multiplication facts through 10x10 and basic multiplication
notes: CCSS 3.OA.7. Kumon emphasizes memorization of multiplication facts for fluency.

description: Kumon Level E covers division including long division with remainders
notes: CCSS 4.NBT.6. Kumon builds procedural fluency with multi-digit division.

kumonTopic: Fractions: equivalent fractions, adding and subtracting
description: Kumon Level E covers equivalent fractions and adding/subtracting fractions with like denominators
notes: CCSS 4.NF. Kumon emphasizes fraction equivalence as foundation for arithmetic.

description: Kumon Level F covers multiplying and dividing fractions and mixed numbers
notes: CCSS 5.NF. Kumon treats fraction operations with full procedural development.

description: Kumon Level F covers decimal place value and all four operations with decimals
notes: CCSS 5.NBT. Kumon builds decimal fluency progressively across worksheets.

description: Kumon Level G introduces ratios, proportions, and unit rate reasoning
notes: CCSS 6.RP. Kumon provides extensive practice with proportional reasoning.

kumonTopic: Integers: operations with positive and negative numbers
description: Kumon Level G covers all operations with positive and negative integers
notes: CCSS 6.NS. Kumon uses number line models and procedural practice.

description: Kumon Level H covers solving linear equations and inequalities in one variable
notes: CCSS 7.EE. Kumon builds equation-solving skills with increasing complexity.

description: Kumon Level H covers solving systems of two linear equations by substitution and elimination
notes: CCSS 8.EE. Kumon introduces systems of equations in Level H.

description: Kumon Level I covers factoring polynomials including GCF, trinomials, and special cases
notes: CCSS Algebra 1 standard. Kumon Level I builds strong polynomial algebra skills.

description: Kumon Level I covers solving quadratic equations by factoring and the quadratic formula
notes: CCSS Algebra 1 standard. Kumon builds from factoring to the quadratic formula.

description: Kumon Level J covers linear and quadratic functions, their graphs, and function transformations
notes: CCSS Algebra 1 / Functions standards. Kumon Level J bridges arithmetic to precalculus.

description: Kumon Level J introduces basic trigonometric ratios in right triangles
notes: CCSS Geometry standard. Kumon introduces trig in Level J alongside functions.
